title: parosela vetula
side_effects: Parosela vetula can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and increased heart rate. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach ulcers. Additionally, individuals with pre-existing medical conditions, such as high blood pressure or kidney disease, may experience worsened symptoms or interact with other medications. Furthermore, improper use of the plant can also cause skin irritation, headaches, and dizziness in sensitive individuals.
